name: Glorified Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 6 Pork chops, each cut 1/2-inch thick (about 1 1/2 lb.)
10 3/4 oz Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, heat the vegetable oil in hot oil.
2. Cook the pork chops half at a time with onion slices for 10 minutes or until browned on both sides.
3. Spoon off any excess fat from the skillet.
4. Stir in the soup and water.
5. Reduce the heat to low.
6. Cover the skillet and simmer for 10 minutes or until the pork chops are fork-tender, stirring occasionally.
7. Serves 6.
